overall.description: A static cinematic scene from a video game depicting a wizarding school library. A character in dark robes sits at a wooden desk reading, while other students occasionally walk through the background. The gothic interior features towering bookshelves, arched windows, and warm natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library reading room with tall bookshelves

events.description: student in dark robes walks through background from left to right behind the main character
two students walk together through background from left to right, passing behind the reading desk

agents.ego_description: sitting at wooden desk reading a large book, occasionally turning pages and adjusting posture

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking across the background from left to right behind the main character

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves filled with leather-bound books lining the right wall
three large gothic arched windows with stone tracery allowing natural light to enter
ornate carved wooden desk with the main character seated at it
vintage brass lamp with green glass shade sitting on the desk
tall stack of books piled on the right side of the desk
decorative patterned rug covering the marble floor in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a grand gothic library with warm natural light streaming through arched windows. The main character sits at a carved wooden desk reading, surrounded by towering bookshelves. Throughout the segment, other students occasionally walk through the background, crossing from left to right behind the seated character, adding life to the otherwise still and scholarly atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric gaze into a grand gothic library where a scholarly stillness is punctuated by subtle movement. It begins with a focus on a character in dark robes seated at a carved wooden desk, immersed in reading amidst the glow of warm natural light streaming through arched windows. As the camera lingers, the surrounding environment reveals its scale through towering bookshelves that frame the quiet scene. The composition then expands to include the rhythmic passage of other students walking through the background from left to right, weaving a sense of living activity into the static, academic setting.
